title: We have closed up shop for the year – THANK YOU all for a wonderful season!!
summary: The CNFAIC has wrapped up for the 2014/15 forecast season. This does not mean avalanche season is over. There is currently (as of May 1) a lot of snow at the higher elevations that has yet to transition to a stable summer snowpack or melt out completely. Please see our springtime tips on the advisor...
